guides.title: Make your first game character
guides.desc: Turn a simple idea into a ready-to-use character with one prompt.

steps.title: Describe your character
steps.text: Write one short line about who your character is. Keep it simple.
steps.prompt: A friendly robot hero, round shapes, bright colors, game character, full body

steps.title: Generate the look
steps.text: Run the prompt and pick the version you like most.

steps.title: Save and use it
steps.text: Export the image and drop it into your game.

guides.result: You now have a game-ready character made from one simple idea.

guides.title: Make a poster in minutes
guides.desc: Turn one idea into a bold, ready-to-share poster with a single prompt.

steps.title: Pick your idea
steps.text: Say in one line what the poster is for. An event, a quote, a product. Keep it simple.
steps.prompt: Bold minimalist poster for a summer music festival, big title text, warm sunset colors, clean modern layout, high contrast

steps.title: Generate the look
steps.text: Run the prompt and pick the version you like most. Try it a few times for more options.

steps.title: Add your own text
steps.text: Swap the example title for your real words. Keep it short so it stays easy to read.
steps.prompt: Replace the title with "SUMMER FEST 2026", keep the same colors and layout

steps.title: Save and share
steps.text: Export the image and post it, print it, or send it out.

guides.result: You have a bold, ready-to-share poster made from one simple idea.

guides.title: Make a game crossover poster
guides.desc: Mix two games into one bold comic-style banner with a single prompt.

steps.title: Pick two games
steps.text: Choose two characters or games you want to mix. Keep the idea in one short sentence.
steps.prompt: Comic-book style crossover poster, two game characters sharing one scene, bold ink outlines, halftone shading, neon sunset city colors

steps.title: Set the scene
steps.text: Say where the scene happens and what each character is doing. Make sure it reads as one story, not two random photos glued together.
steps.prompt: One character covers the other from a rooftop with a sniper rifle while the other walks a neon city street holding a pistol, split by a diagonal comic panel line

steps.title: Add a title and caption
steps.text: Add a big crossover logo with both names, plus a short bold caption at the bottom.
steps.prompt: Add bold comic logo text combining both game names, and a caption box at the bottom with a short punchy mission title

steps.title: Generate and pick your favorite
steps.text: Run the prompt a few times and keep the version with the cleanest text and the most exciting scene.

guides.result: A sharp, comic-style crossover banner ready to post or use as cover art.
